title: Replay Decision Analysis
description: Governed artifact produced by the BQ Replay Decision Integrity Engine. Evaluates whether a replayed execution reproduces the same SLO decision and enforcement outcome as the original run, establishing decision reproducibility and enabling drift detection.

analysis_id.description: Unique identifier for this decision analysis run (UUID-4).

trace_id.description: The trace_id of the original execution being analyzed.

replay_result_id.description: The replay_id from the replay_result artifact this analysis is based on.

original_decision.description: Summary of the SLO enforcement decision from the original execution.

decision_status.description: Enforcement outcome from the original run (e.g. allow, fail).

decision_reason_code.description: Reason code from the original enforcement decision.

enforcement_policy.description: Policy profile used in the original enforcement decision.

recommended_action.description: Recommended action from the original enforcement decision.

traceability_integrity_sli.description: TI SLI value from the original decision.

replay_decision.description: Summary of the SLO enforcement decision recomputed from the replay.

decision_status.description: Enforcement outcome from the replay (e.g. allow, fail).

decision_reason_code.description: Reason code from the replayed enforcement decision.

enforcement_policy.description: Policy profile used in the replayed enforcement decision.

recommended_action.description: Recommended action from the replayed enforcement decision.

traceability_integrity_sli.description: TI SLI value from the replayed decision.

decision_consistency.description: Assessment of whether original and replay decisions are consistent.

status.description: Consistency verdict: 'consistent' if decisions match, 'drifted' if they differ, 'indeterminate' if comparison could not be completed.

differences.description: List of detected decision differences. Empty when status is consistent.

field.description: Decision field where the difference was found.

drift_type.description: Classification of detected drift. Null when no drift is detected or when status is indeterminate (comparison could not be completed).

reproducibility_score.description: Score in [0, 1] quantifying the degree to which the decision was reproduced. 1.0 = fully consistent, 0.0 = completely inconsistent.

explanation.description: Human-readable explanation of the analysis result, including drift rationale if applicable.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this analysis artifact was created.
